commit.message:
Unicode normalize the string

We're using `NFKD` as it decomposes the character, so we get the simplest version of it, and we can then later throw away the special pieces.

Do custom replacements as the first transformation

This means if you want to replace a character and then have it separated by dashes, you need to change `customReplacements: [['🦄', 'unicorn']]` to `customReplacements: [['🦄', ' unicorn ']]`.

Fixes #17

Fix `customReplacements` option on empty string replacements (#16)

Fixes #9
Add link to the CLI for this module
